title: Dekton White Excluding Draught Tape – 5m x 10mm Foam Weather Strip with 5mm Thickness for Doors and Windows, Self-Adhesive Backing, Easy to Cut and Apply for Effective Insulation and Draft Prevention.
features: Effective Insulation: Dekton White Excluding Draught Tape is designed to provide a reliable seal for doors and windows, effectively blocking unwanted drafts and helping to maintain indoor temperature. This insulation feature not only enhances comfort but also reduces energy costs by preventing heat loss.

Self-Adhesive Backing: The tape comes with a strong self-adhesive backing, making application quick and hassle-free. Simply peel off the protective layer and stick it to the desired surface. It adheres securely to most materials, ensuring a long-lasting bond without the need for additional tools or adhesives.

Easy to Cut and Apply: Measuring 5m in length and 10mm in width, this foam weather strip is easy to cut to size, allowing for custom fitment around any door or window. Whether you’re sealing a small gap or a larger area, you can easily adjust the length to suit your specific needs.

Durable and Versatile: Made from high-quality foam, this weather strip is designed to withstand various weather conditions, ensuring reliable performance over time. It is suitable for both residential and commercial applications, providing flexibility for use in different environments.

Simple Maintenance: The smooth surface of the tape makes it easy to clean and maintain. Should you need to replace it, removal is straightforward without damaging the underlying surfaces, making it an ideal solution for those looking to enhance their home’s energy efficiency with minimal effort.
description: Dekton White Excluding Draught Tape is an essential solution for sealing doors and windows against unwanted drafts. Measuring 5m in length and 10mm in width, this foam weather strip features a thickness of 5mm, providing effective insulation that helps maintain a comfortable indoor temperature while reducing energy costs. The self-adhesive backing ensures easy application; simply peel and stick for a secure bond on most surfaces without the need for additional tools. Its high-quality foam is designed to withstand various weather conditions, making it durable and reliable for both residential and commercial use. The tape is easy to cut to the desired length, allowing for a custom fit around any door or window. With its smooth surface, maintenance is a breeze, and removal is straightforward without damaging surfaces. Enhance your home’s energy efficiency with Dekton White Excluding Draught Tape, ensuring a comfortable living environment year-round while saving on heating and cooling expenses.
